ead.archdesc:
======= RMM08006Food and recipe booklets collection8006Compiled by Jessica ShonDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
February 20, 20092B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
humecThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 19:06:22 UTC.12/07/2018

English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Food and recipe booklets collection 8006
1.8 cubic feet. 1.8 cubic feet.
1864-1976. Printed Materials Booklets relating to food and cooking. Collection material in English 5623691
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Jessica Shon
Date completed:
February 20, 2009
EAD encoding:
Jessica Shon, February 20, 2009 Eileen Keating, January 19, 2012
Date modified:
RMC Staff, March 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Booklets relating to food and cooking.
Cite As:
Food and recipe booklets collection, #8006. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
RELATED MATERIALS
Related material in collection #8568, Diane Scrima Collection of Recipe Booklets and Cookbooks.
Cookbooks. Recipes. Food conservation. Cooking (Gelatin) World War II. World War, 1914-1918 -- Civilian participation. Formulas, recipes, etc. -- United States -- History. Cooking, American -- History.
5623691 <<<<<<< HEAD Food and Recipe Booklets ca. 1880s-1970sAppliances11-3Arrow Publishing14Baking Powder-included Rumford15Bread, including Fleischmann's16Canning17Center for Service in Public Interest18Cheese19Corn110Cutlery111Desserts112Fish and Shellfish113Flour114Food porn115Fondue116Frozen Foods117General Electric118General Foods Corporation119Grange League Federation (GLF)120Great Atlantic Lobster Co.121Holiday21Home Canning Supplies22Home Economics Bulletins23Home Economics Recipes24Hunger25Insurance- Metropolitan Life26Jams & Jellies27Gelatin-Jello, Knox, Larkin28Kitchen Equipment29Knudsen210Lard211Management212Margarine213Marketing214McCall's Recipes215Meat216Milk-evaporated and Nestle's217Mustard218National Dairy Council219Oil-Weson220Orange Juice-Sunkist221Outdoor222Party food and beverages223Quaker Oats224Quality Bakers of America225Recipes/Recipe Cards226Recipes/Recipe Card - including Kate Smith's Favorite Recipes (1939)31Recipes/Recipe Card - including Kate Smith's Favorite Recipes (1939)32Reynolds Wrap33Salads34Sandwiches35Sauerkraut36Soap37Soap38Stainless Steel39Sucaryl-non-caloric sweetner310Tobacco311USDA312Walnuts313Westinghouse - Home Freeze Guide19685Yankee Books3144-H Dairy Foods Project Manual315Rice Council - Great Dinners for Six316California Raisin Brochure317American Egg Board318Brochures for Corn Syrup, Mazola Oil, Hellmann's Mayo, Skippy Peanut Butter319Soy320"Food of Our Fathers" - Institute of Food Technologists321Kraft - "Outsmarting the Cash Register"322Handwritten recipe book323
General
Blank book with printed title "Recipes: my friends' and my own," copyright 1900, with recipes written in by hand or glued in as newspaper clippings.Handwritten recipe book324
General
Untitled recipe book, with signature MRN, 1860 on front pastedown. Mostly cake recipes, together with some for vegetables (such as pickled cabbage), soda water, etc. Poor condition, fragile binding, pages stained.Loose recipes325Miscellaneous-not recipes326Commercial recipe booklets-Karo Cook Book by Emma Churchman Hewitt; "Superior Salads," from Duffy's Apple Juice Vinegar; "Directions for Operating 'Lorain' Oven Heat Regulator," American Stove Company; Book of Formulas for Preparing of Syrups, Etc.," Crown Cordial and Extract Company; "The Celebrated Vienna Pressed Yeast"undated41"Just a Cook Book for Economical Gas Cooking," American Stove Company190241"100 Ways to Better Health," Battle Creek Food Company192241Mrs. Winslow's Domestic Receipt Book1872187542Ransom's Family Receipt Book18761879188442The Ladies Note-Book and Calendar188242Choice Receipts by Maria Parloa189342National Yeast Company, Seneca Fallsno date42The Housekeeper's Receipt Book, Carter's Compound Extract of Smart Weedno date42Hyde's Practical Miscellaneous Recipe Book185543"The Practical Cookbook," by Mrs. H. M. Robinson, New York: Abbey and Barrett186444The American Domestic Cook Book1869-187045"Choice Gleanings," Columbus Avenue Church, Boston, MA.188346"Tompkins County Old Time Recipes and Philosophy of Housekeeping," Cornell University193747Money-Saving Main Dishes, USDA and "Hot from the Oven," cookie recipes compiled by Elinor Genung Allen194848Family Fare: Food Management and Recipes, USDA195048Handwritten recipe books49-11"Cooking with Imagination for Special Diets"412"Holiday Meals For Wartime", by Mary Lee Taylor5"Drinking and Dining Recipes from the Original Thirteen Colonies", by Lord Calvert Whiskey Company5"The History of the Spoon, Knife and Fork", by Reed and Barton19265"The History of Spices" by American Spice Trade Association19605"A Handbook on the Jewish Dietary Laws"19545"Ways with Wine" Paul Masson Vineyards19685"Thoughts for Teas" by Saga Food Service5Notebook with clippings of World War I recipes, especially for meatless and wheatless meals5"From Tree to Table", Curtice Brothers Company, Preservers, Rochester, New York18935D.M. Osborne and Company, "Handy Book for House and Farm"no date5"Apples for You!", Alice L. Spencer (Recipes) and E. Stuart Hubbard (Horticulturalist)no date5"Campfire Girl (CFG) Campfire Cookery"no date5"Trail Cookery for Girl Scouts"no date5"Trail Cookery for Girl Scouts", by the Home Economics Dept., Kellogg Company, Battle Creek, Michiganno date5"A Manual of Cooking for Boy Scouts", by the Home Economics Dept., Kellogg Company, Battle Creek, Michiganno date5"Cheese", by Luella Sherman Mortensen and Beulah V. Gillaspie (McCall's Magazine)no date5"Summer Cook Book", by Good Housekeepingno date5"Canned Salmon Delicacies", by Lola M. Cremeans (University of Alaska)19375"Health-for-Victory Club Meal Planning Guide / Early Summer Home Canning: What to Can ... How to Do It", by Home Economics Institute19435"Perfect Pies and How to Make Them", by National Household Service and The Proctor and Gamble Co.19285"Wonder Sandwich Suggestions", by Alice Adams Proctor19305"Spring Suggestions, Including Lenten Recipes", by The Food Education Bureauno date5"When You Entertain: A Woman's Home Companion Booklet"19335"Your War Garden for 1944: Helpful Information from Firestone Farm and Garden Service Bureau"19445"Food and Health", by Lydia E. Pinkham Medicine Co.no date5"Cook with Milk", by the Extension Service of the College of Agriculture, University of Wisconsin, Madison19315"Ways to Use Wisconsin Apples", by the Extension Service of the College of Agriculture, University of Wisconsin, Madison19315"Rumford Cook Book", by Fannie Merritt Farmer (and the Rumford Chemical Works)no date5"Everyday Uses for Cherries", by Luella Mortensonno date5"Bananas Take a Bow ... in Attractive New Dishes for the Up-to-Date Hostess"no date5"Banana Salad Bazaar", by the Home Economics Dept., Fruit Dispatch Co.no date5"Quick-Quick-Quick 16 Smackin'-Good Meal Ideas with the New Minute Rice", by General Foods Corp.19495"What Shall I Cook Today? 124 Thrifty, Healthful Tested Recipes" with Spry (Pure Vegetable Shortening), by the Lever Brothers Co.no date5"Magic Short-Cut Recipes for the Automatic Refrigerator"no date5"Minute Cook Book", by the Minute Tapioca Co., Orange, Mass.19155"Menu Magic", by the National Biscuit Company19325"Eggs: 100 Tempting Ways to Serve Them", by the New England Fresh Egg Institute, Worcester, Mass.no date5Milk Recipes by H. P. Hood and Sonsno date5"Recipes for Today", by General Foods Corp.19435"Tested Recipes: Successful Baking for Flavor and Texture", by Martha Lee Anderson19365"The Right Food for Your Family", by the Vermont State Nutrition Committee and the Maltex Companyno date5"What to Eat and Why", by Alice F. Blood19395"Atlas Book of Recipes and Helpful Information about Canning",no date5"The Sunny Side of Life Book", by the Kellogg Company, Battle Creek, Michigan19345"A New Way of Living: Come Over to the Sunny Side of Life", by the Kellogg Company, Battle Creek, Michigan19325"Nutrition: Important Flashes of Nutrition News", by the Quaker Oats Company1938-19405
Scope and Contents
(Vol. 1, No. 3-5; Vol. 2, No. 9; Vol. 3, No. 1)"The Student Home Economist: A National Newspaper for Home Economics Students"19385
Scope and Contents
(Vol. 1, No. 1)"Household Nutrition: A Timely and Reliable Clip-Sheet for the Women"19315
Scope and Contents
(July 25 and "Spring Issue")"Wonderful Ways with Soups from Campbells"19585"Plain and Fancy Gravy Dishes" Campbell Soup CompanyUndated5Campbell's Red Kettle Soup Mix RecipesUndated5"50 Classic Bean Dishes" Campbell Soup CompanyUndated5"It's Home From Work We Go" Campbell Soup CompanyUndated5 ======= Food and Recipe Booklets ca. 1880s-1970sAppliances11-3Arrow Publishing14Baking Powder-included Rumford15Bread, including Fleischmann's16Canning17Center for Service in Public Interest18Cheese19Corn110Cutlery111Desserts112Fish and Shellfish113Flour114Food porn115Fondue116Frozen Foods117General Electric118General Foods Corporation119Grange League Federation (GLF)120Great Atlantic Lobster Co.121Holiday21Home Canning Supplies22Home Economics Bulletins23Home Economics Recipes24Hunger25Insurance- Metropolitan Life26Jams & Jellies27Gelatin-Jello, Knox, Larkin28Kitchen Equipment29Knudsen210Lard211Management212Margarine213Marketing214McCall's Recipes215Meat216Milk-evaporated and Nestle's217Mustard218National Dairy Council219Oil-Weson220Orange Juice-Sunkist221Outdoor222Party food and beverages223Quaker Oats224Quality Bakers of America225Recipes/Recipe Cards226Recipes/Recipe Card - including Kate Smith's Favorite Recipes (1939)31Recipes/Recipe Card - including Kate Smith's Favorite Recipes (1939)32Reynolds Wrap33Salads34Sandwiches35Sauerkraut36Soap37Soap38Stainless Steel39Sucaryl-non-caloric sweetner310Tobacco311USDA312Walnuts313Westinghouse - Home Freeze Guide19685Yankee Books3144-H Dairy Foods Project Manual315Rice Council - Great Dinners for Six316California Raisin Brochure317American Egg Board318Brochures for Corn Syrup, Mazola Oil, Hellmann's Mayo, Skippy Peanut Butter319Soy320"Food of Our Fathers" - Institute of Food Technologists321Kraft - "Outsmarting the Cash Register"322Handwritten recipe book323
